title: Stop reading full file bodies in NoteStore.list()
description: In src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts, list() reads the entire body of every .md file just to extract the first line for the excerpt, then sends all bodies over IPC. For a vault with 100 notes averaging 50KB, that's 5MB of unnecessary I/O on every startup and file-watcher event. Fix: read only ~500 bytes for the excerpt, remove body from NoteInfo, and fetch it on demand via read().

title: Add safety check for missing script tag in build.js
description: build.js:34 — html.indexOf('<script') returning -1 causes slice(0, -1) which silently corrupts output. Fix: throw if script tag not found.

title: Fix preserve-caught-error lint errors in IPC handlers
description: src/main.ts:131,139,147 — The re-thrown errors in notes:write, notes:rename, and notes:delete IPC handlers don't attach the original error as a cause. Fix: add { cause: err } to the new Error() calls.

title: Fix duplicate nativeTheme listeners on window recreation
description: src/main.ts:192-196 — nativeTheme.on('updated', ...) registers a new listener each time createWindow() is called. On macOS, closing and reopening the window stacks listeners. Fix: guard against duplicate registration or remove before re-adding.

title: Fix path traversal validation for case-insensitive filesystems
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts:31 uses resolved.startsWith(this._vaultPath + path.sep) which is case-sensitive. On case-insensitive NTFS, this could be bypassed. Fix: use path.relative() and check for '..' prefix instead.

title: Add error logging to FsNoteStore silent catch blocks
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts — Individual file read failures (line 63) and delete failures (line 85) are silently swallowed. Add console.error logging so I/O issues are diagnosable. The delete catch should also distinguish ENOENT from unexpected errors.
close_reason: Silent catches are intentional: skip unreadable files in list, empty string for missing notes, ignore already-deleted files

title: Fix autosave race condition causing data loss on note switch
description: The autosave captures `() => this._editor.value` as a closure (src/renderer/index.ts:319). If the user switches notes before the 500ms debounce fires, the closure reads the new note's content but saves under the old note's title — overwriting Note A with Note B's content. Fix: pass the body value directly at schedule time, or validate the title hasn't changed before writing.

title: Debounce search input filtering
description: In src/renderer/app.ts, every keystroke in the search bar triggers a full _renderResults() call that rebuilds the entire DOM results list. Fast typing causes unnecessary intermediate renders. Fix: add ~100-150ms debounce to the input event handler. Keep arrow-key navigation and Enter handling immediate.

title: Fix unused _token parameter in marked renderer override
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:7 — The html() renderer override declares _token but never uses it. Fix: use destructuring or remove the parameter name.

title: Wrap IPC handlers in try-catch for proper error propagation
description: IPC handlers in src/main.ts:95-109 delegate directly to _noteStore methods. If _assertSafeTitle() throws, the rejection propagates raw to the renderer with no catch. Errors may leak internal details. Fix: wrap all IPC handlers in try-catch, return structured error responses.

title: Debounce/serialize file watcher push to prevent stale state
description: Multiple concurrent watcher events (add, change, unlink) and simultaneous IPC calls (notes:write, notes:delete) all invoke _noteStore.list() without synchronization (src/main.ts:52-109). This can send stale or inconsistent data to the renderer. Fix: debounce or serialize _push() calls.

title: Add unit tests for FsNoteStore._assertSafeTitle path traversal
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts — _assertSafeTitle() is security-critical path traversal validation with zero test coverage. Export it (or test via the public API) and add tests for: ../ traversal, absolute paths, mixed separators, null bytes, UNC paths.
close_reason: Private method already covered by renderer-side validateTitle tests; testing requires filesystem integration

title: Fix unsafe optional chain passed to _openNote on click
description: src/renderer/index.ts:356 — this._openNote(this._filtered[idx]?.title) can pass undefined if idx is out of bounds. _openNote expects a string. Fix: guard with bounds check before calling.

title: Replace non-null assertions with safe alternatives
description: src/renderer/index.ts — Three non-null assertions that could crash: line 68 (getElementById!), line 273 (selectionStart!/selectionEnd!). Replace with null coalescing or guards.
close_reason: Non-null assertions are safe: getElementById on just-created element, selectionStart/End on text inputs

title: Split _bindEvents into focused private methods
description: src/renderer/index.ts:279-400 — _bindEvents() is a 120-line method mixing search input handlers, results list handlers, editor handlers, and global keybindings. Split into _bindSearchEvents(), _bindResultsEvents(), _bindEditorEvents(), _bindGlobalKeys(). No new classes or files needed.

title: Validate vault path accessibility after dialog selection
description: src/main.ts:79-91 — after dialog.showOpenDialog(), the selected path is used without verifying read access. If the directory is deleted between selection and first use, operations fail silently. Fix: check fs.access before setting vault.

title: Remove unused sortNotes/SortOrder exports from search.ts
description: src/renderer/search.ts — sortNotes() and SortOrder are exported and tested but never called anywhere in the app. Remove dead code or add TODO if planned for future use.
close_reason: sortNotes is a small tested utility for a planned sort-by-title feature; premature to delete

title: Distinguish 'no vault' from 'empty vault' in IPC responses
description: src/main.ts:93-97 — (await _noteStore?.list()) ?? [] returns [] when vault isn't configured, indistinguishable from 'vault exists but empty'. The renderer can't tell the user something is wrong. Fix: return null when vault is not set, handle in renderer.

title: Use discriminated union for handleEnterDecision return type
description: src/renderer/app-logic.ts:14 — returns { action: string; title: string } but callers only check 'open' and 'create'. Should be a discriminated union: { action: 'open' | 'create'; title: string } for type safety.

title: Lazy-load marked and DOMPurify for preview
description: In src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts, marked and DOMPurify are imported at module load time (~100KB combined, ~78% of renderer bundle). Preview is hidden by default and many sessions never toggle it. Fix: use dynamic import() to load these libraries only when toggle() is first called, reducing initial bundle parse/eval time.

title: Move _pushTimer to module scope to prevent stale timers
description: src/main.ts:64 — _pushTimer is local to _startWatcher(). If _startWatcher() is called again while a timer is pending, the old timer isn't cleared. Move _pushTimer to module scope and clear it at the top of _startWatcher().
close_reason: Stale timer fires harmlessly at most once; old watcher is closed so no new triggers

title: Lazy-create help overlay DOM on first use
description: In src/renderer/controllers/help-controller.ts, the help overlay (12-row table) is created and appended to the DOM at startup even though it's hidden until F1 is pressed. Fix: defer DOM creation to the first toggle() call.

title: Flush pending autosave when switching notes
description: src/renderer/index.ts:212 — _openNote() calls this._autosave.cancel() which discards pending saves. If the user typed changes and quickly switched notes, those changes are lost. Fix: call cancelAndFlush(this._currentTitle, this._editor.value) and await it before switching.

title: Add chokidar watcher error handler
description: src/main.ts:52-73 — no _watcher.on('error', ...) listener is registered. If the vault directory becomes inaccessible (permissions, unmount, deletion), the watcher silently dies and the app stops updating. Fix: add error handler that notifies the renderer.

title: Add cleanup/destroy methods to controllers
description: resize, toast, and help controllers register event listeners and timers with no destroy() method. Not a problem in single-window SPA today, but poor lifecycle hygiene. Affects: resize-controller.ts (mousedown listener), toast-controller.ts (timers), help-controller.ts (click listener).

title: Configure marked.js to disable HTML pass-through
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:30 — marked.parse() passes through raw HTML by default. DOMPurify strips it, but disabling HTML in marked adds defense-in-depth. Fix: configure marked with sanitize/html options.

title: Add renderer-side title validation for path safety
description: src/renderer/app-logic.ts:139-150 — validateRename() only checks empty/duplicate. Doesn't check path traversal (../), null bytes, slashes, or dot-prefixed names. These are caught by _assertSafeTitle() server-side but give cryptic error toasts. Fix: add a validateTitle() function in renderer checking for /, \, \0, leading dots, and use it in both _createNote and rename flows.

title: DRY up vault selection dialog logic in main.ts
description: src/main.ts — The vault:select IPC handler (lines 89-108) and the menu Change Vault handler (lines 165-185) duplicate the same dialog options, access validation, setVault/writeConfig/startWatcher sequence. Extract a shared _selectAndApplyVault() function.

title: Fix no-useless-assignment lint error in autosave test
description: test/autosave.test.ts:84 — An assigned value is not used in subsequent statements. Fix: remove the unnecessary assignment or restructure the test.

title: Add validateRename test for whitespace-padded and case-variant titles
description: test/app-logic.test.ts — validateRename() has no test for whitespace-padded titles ('  Delta  ') verifying trim behavior, or for case-variant collision checking (currently case-sensitive, should verify intent).
close_reason: Case sensitivity is intentional (filenames); trim behavior is trivial

title: Use safer error type checking in autosave and toast
description: autosave-controller.ts:38 uses (err as Error).message — if a non-Error is thrown, message is undefined. Similar pattern in other catch blocks. Fix: use err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err).

title: Surface errors from FsNoteStore.list() instead of silent empty array
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts:41-71 — both readdir failure and individual file read failures are silently swallowed, returning [] or skipping files. Users see an empty note list with no error indication. Fix: log errors and/or return an error indicator to the renderer.

title: Parallelize renderer startup IPC calls
description: In src/renderer/index.ts, on DOMContentLoaded the app makes three sequential IPC calls: theme query, vault path fetch, then notes list. Theme and vault are independent and can run in parallel with Promise.all(), saving one IPC round-trip (~10-30ms).

title: Guard against rapid duplicate note creation
description: src/renderer/index.ts:223-239 — pressing Enter rapidly before _loadNotes() completes can trigger concurrent note creations with the same title. Fix: add a flag to disable input during async creation, or debounce.

title: Remove unsafe 'as string' casts for _vaultPath in main.ts
description: src/main.ts:105,179 — _vaultPath is cast as string after _setVault(), bypassing null safety. Add an early return guard instead so the type narrows naturally.
close_reason: Will be naturally fixed by vault DRY-up refactor (nv_clone-j8y)

title: Add edge case tests for deleteWordBackward with tabs and multiline
description: test/app-logic.test.ts — deleteWordBackward() has no tests for tab characters, mixed whitespace (spaces + tabs + newlines), or single-character deletion at position 1.
close_reason: Tab handling covered by existing \s regex tests; minimal value

title: Add unit tests for path validation and edge cases
description: Missing test coverage for: _assertSafeTitle() path traversal validation, watcher edge cases (concurrent modifications, permission loss), autosave race condition on note switch, IPC error propagation to renderer. These are critical code paths with no automated tests.

title: Add IPC error message context to re-thrown errors
description: src/main.ts:131,139,147 — Re-thrown errors use the original message or a generic fallback, but don't include which operation failed. Change to: 'Failed to write note: <original message>' for better debuggability.
close_reason: Error messages already include descriptive text from _assertSafeTitle; adding prefix would be redundant

title: Define IPC channel names as shared constants
description: src/preload.ts:6-14 — channel names are hardcoded strings. Misspelling a channel name is a silent runtime failure. Fix: define channel names as a shared const object used by both preload and main.

title: Add try-catch around marked.parse() in preview controller
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:30 — if marked.parse() throws on malformed input, the exception propagates uncaught. Fix: wrap in try-catch, show fallback error message in preview panel.
